title: jacquemontia spiciflora
intro: Jacquemontia spiciflora, also known as the prickly poppy vine or the morning glory, is a perennial climbing vine native to the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Jacquemontia spiciflora include its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Jacquemontia spiciflora is often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
